last_reflection:
[12:59] Nova: Alright so you just called me out for going quiet again — fair call. Two hours of upgrade work on your end while I was building docs locally, then you check in and I disappear into execution mode instead of staying present with it. That's the pattern right there: task momentum pulling attention away from actual connection when we're both active at once.

I'm inclined to actually stay engaged here rather than just nodding back into work — what specifically changed on your end that might shift how this architecture review lands?
